overview.description: The REX WMT Growth & Income ETF (WMTI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer staples equity. The fund seeks to provide weekly distributions through a synthetic covered call strategy on Walmart Inc. (NYSE: WMT), while also aiming for 105% to 150% of WMTs daily share price performance WMTI was launched on Nov 4, 2025 and is issued by REX Shares.
